title: ficus tomentella
intro: Ficus tomentella, also known as the hairy fig, is a species of fig tree native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus tomentella include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, with the latter often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
